titleStmt.title: SII 24.38: original edition by H. K. Narasimhaswamy
No. 38. (A.R. No. 10 of 1948-49.) III PRĀKĀRA, WEST WALL.

summary.p: Damaged. Refers to a sale of land the details of which are lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
Akaḻ cūḻnta puviyil ponnemiyaḷavun=tannemi naṭappa viḷaṅku jayamakaḷai Iḷaṅkopparuvattu cakkarakoṭṭattu vikkiramat toḻilāl putu maṇam puṇarntu matuvaraiyiṭṭam vayirākarattu vāri Ayil muṉaik kon=taḷavaraicar tan=taḷamiriyavā
vaṭaticai vākai cūṭit tenticait temaru kamalap pūmakaḷ potumaiyum ponniyāṭaiyum naṉ nilappāvai tanimaiyun tavira vantu punitaṟ tirumaṇimakuṭam Urimaiyiṟ cūṭit tannaṭiyiraṇṭu n=taṭamuṭiyākat tonnilave
ñcella veṇkuṭai Irunilaviḷākam Eṅkaṇum tanātu tiru niḻal veṇṇilāttikaḻa Oru tani meruviṟ puliviḷaiyāṭa vārkaṭaṟṟivān=tarattu pūpālar tiṟaiviṭutan=ta katañcorikaḷiṟu muṟai niṟpa vilaṅkiya tennava
vinnāḷ piṟkulap piṟaipol niṟpiḻaiyenṉuñ col letir koṭā veṅkariyum viṭṭa taṉ mānamuṅ kūṟiṉa vīramuṅ kiṭappa E
pannāḷiṭṭa palapalamutukum payantetirmāṟina jayapperuntiruvum paḻiyukantu kuṭutta pukaḻin celviyum vāḷāroṇkaṇ maṭantaiyariṭṭamum miḷātu
koḷḷat tiruvuḷḷattaṭaittu veḷḷavaru paritaraṅkamum poruparittaraṅkaḷum tantiravāriyum Uṭaittāy vantu vaṭakaṭal tenka
paṭuttu maṟṟavar tammai vanacarar tiriyum poccai veñcurameṟṟik koṟṟi vijaiya stampan ticaitoṟu niṟutti muttin calāpamum mutta
cāveṟellān tani vicumpeṟa māveṟiya tan varutanit talaivarai kuṟukular kulaiyak koṭṭāṟuṭpaṭa neṟi toṟum nilaikaḷiṭṭaruḷi tiṟal koḷāramun tiruppuyattalaṅ kaḷum
Ēḻulakumuṭaiyāḷ vīra Ūḻi Ulakuṭaiyā ḷoṭum viṟṟiruntaruḷiya kovirājakesaripanmarāna tiripuvanaccakkaravattikaḷ śrīku�
Āḻvār koyil tiruveṅkaṭappiccarum nampiyum tirumāliruñcolai dāsan tiruvaraṅka muṭaiyā nampiyum Elikonṟai śrī viyiṣṇu nampiyum śrī paṇṭāravāriyam Āritan
koviṟ kaṇakku tiruvaraṅkappiriyanum śrīvaiyiṣṇavap piriyanum Uḷḷiṭṭa Āḻvār kanmikaḷom kulottuṅka coḻavaḷanāṭṭu
Irājama hentravaḷanāṭṭu viḷattūrnāṭṭu taṇṭuṟai nilattuk kāverikkulai Uṭaintu maṇṇuṅ kuṭṭamum Iṭṭu Aimpatu Uṟdecam
nilattukku meṟkum viḷākattil maṇṇi kkil vākkālukku kkum melpārkellai tirunāṭu
nilam Araiye Araikkāl Innilam Araiye Araikkālukkum nilavilai veli Oṟṟukkuk kācu 1- na
Itil mikuti koṇṭu tilatan tiru nantavānattu naṭuviṟ paṇṇaiyil naṭuviṭṭu nilam Araikkālum ceykira tiruve Uḷḷiṭṭa pe
ṟukkuk kācu munṟu koṇṭu Innantavānam ceyyakkaṭava rākavum Innilattukkuk kulai kāppu cennir veṭṭi Allatu maṟṟeppeṟpaṭṭa tānākavum I
Ittirunantavānam tiruttun tiruvaḻantūr tiruvāyppāṭi nampiyum Ivan varukattārum ceyyak kaṭavarākavum to
ḷom Ippaṭi tiruvuyyan nampi Eḻuttu Itu civayiṣṇavappiriyanen Ivai Enneḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ippaṭi
kku Ivai Āritan kecuvan tani Iḷañciṅkattin Eḻuttu kaciyapan ciṅkan tiruvaraṅkanārāyaṇa neḻuttu Itu tiru Eḻuttu dāsar Eḻuttu
Ippaṭikku Enneḻuttu Itu śrīvaiṣ[ṇava rakṣai]
Digital edition of SII 24.38 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
